subcodes.first_line: O Faith! We have made mention of thee aforetime, and have sent unto thee that wherefrom the sincere ones inhaled the fragrance of their Lord's loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایمان قد ذکرناک من قبل و ارسلنا الیک ما وجد منه المخلصون عرف عنایه ربهم
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
